chunks.text: Lately, I have been thinking about what is important to me.
What matters seems to be only the essential.
What I had pursued for a long time was not always significant.
What truly matters is the small meal with family, the call from a friend
What I must not lose is these small things.
" What you have learned through experience becomes the center of your own value.
" Yes, what I have learned is what matters.
I wanted to reveal, once more, what would fulfill me.
Friendship, quiet time, and what I myself have long treasured.
These are what I hope to recover now.
